market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: £552/night Spacious Home with Private Lake & Garden
4-Guest Home with Lake Access & Garden Nearby
analysis.rewritten_desc: This luxurious 4-guest home delivers exclusive access to a pristine lake and private garden—perfect for nature lovers seeking solitude. Positioned 216% above the local median rate of £175/night, it currently lags 46% in occupancy compared to the 28.3% average in the market. While the spacious layout and premium amenities promise a premium experience, the listing urgently needs clarity on which high-demand features (like outdoor spaces, parking, or entertainment options) are available. With 76 open nights remaining in the next 90 days, a sharper title, bullet-pointed feature list, and cover photo of the lake view could reposition this home as a top-tier escape for discerning travelers willing to pay a premium.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor (e.g. private dock or fire pit features)
Parking & facilities (e.g. garage or EV charging)
Entertainment (e.g. smart TV or gaming console)
analysis.photo_order_rec: The cover image should show the property's lake-access view (e.g. window or deck facing water) to capitalize on the listing's strongest differentiator. Visual proof of this premium amenity is critical when targeting high-GBP guests.
key_diagnosis: Your £552 nightly rate is £377 above the market median, yet occupancy is 15.2% vs 28.3% — a 46% shortfall that hurts potential revenue.
The description field is entirely empty, losing a prime opportunity to highlight unique selling points that justify the premium price.
No amenities are listed at all, missing 3 key high-value categories (Outdoor, Parking & facilities, Entertainment) that drive bookings in this tier of the market.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £552/night rate is 216% above the local median, but with 15.2% occupancy vs 28.3% industry average — three fixes could recover £31k+ in potential revenue across 90 nights.
